reviews.comment:
Muy bueno muy limpios los sanitarios. La atención en el mostrador excelente‼️ sí bien a la hora que pasamos no es un horario pico. Las chicas ya estaban muy atentas a las solicitudes y con muy buenos modos‼️

(Translated by Google)
Very good, the restrooms were very clean. The service at the counter was excellent! Although we went during off-peak hours, the staff were very attentive to our requests and very polite!
